baseline.label: Measured one-person manual run (runbook-guided operator, no AI assistance), 2026-07-15 07:39:00-07:47:21 UTC
baseline.source_requirement: Measured outside YITING with a stopwatch, saved run log, or single-agent/manual rehearsal notes.

comparison_method.fairness_rule: Compare the same incident family and the same terminal criterion; when runsummary exposes incident_family, only matching runs are used.
comparison_method.terminal_criterion: Terminal incident state with recovery verification when an action executes.
